sections.paragraph:
Ἀβιαθάρ, ὁ (Ἀβιάθαρ edd.) indecl. (אֶבְיָתָר) (in Joseph. Ἀβιάθαρος, ου [Ant. 7, 110]) Abiathar, priest at Nob (1 Km 22:20ff), son of Ahimelech (1 Km 21:2, 7) Mk 2:26, where he is mentioned in place of his father.

edd. edd. = editions, editors

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

ff ff = (and) following

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 2
